title: Guidance and Standard Operating Procedure for SARS-CoV-2 Detection
author: S M Rashed Ul Islam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This Guidance and Standard Operating Procedure for the detection of SARS-CoV-2 detection that can be handy to all the COVID-19 laboratory of Bangladesh. This will provide an overview that required for the COVID-19 detection in patients. In this book, all the steps that require for the SARS-CoV-2 detection have been incorporated, starting from the specimen collection to report generation. Biosafety and waste disposal are also the main component that needs great attention to avoid infections. Various guidelines to deal with laboratory waste has also been discussed step-wise. In the appendix section, this book also attached all the necessary pictorial guides that need to follow all the laboratory people during their day to day performance. 

 This guidance and standard operating procedure for SARS-CoV-2 detection have been prepared by the Department of Virology, Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Medical University (BSMMU) and to be followed at the COVID-19 Laboratory, BSMMU.
